criteria.criterion: setup.js auto-executes Ollama install with user prompt
Ollama already installed: setup skips install step
User declines prompt: exits gracefully with non-zero code
hub.js sendCommand supports speak command type
hub.js sendCommand supports display command type
hub.js sendCommand supports capture command (no regression)
hub.js sendCommand unknown type: error returned/logged
llm.js selects model from optimizer profile, not hardcoded
Different hardware profiles result in different model selections
README.md exists with npx, global, Docker install instructions
README.md contains REST API endpoint documentation
